description_long: This lantern features a rectangular, box-like structure with a predominantly orange surface bordered and accented by black trim. Each side displays a different word in a stylized, jagged font: 'WELCOME', 'ALOHA', and 'LUA', with one side left blank. Above each word panel, there is a black silhouette of a bat with outstretched wings, set against an orange background, adding a Halloween or festive theme. The top of the lantern appears to have a handle or opening, suggesting portability and ease of carrying. The surface has a slightly glossy, crinkled appearance, indicating it may be made from a lightweight, flexible material such as plastic or coated paper. The overall design is decorative and thematic, suitable for festive urban environments or seasonal outdoor displays.
description: A rectangular orange lantern with black bat motifs and stylized words on each side, featuring a glossy, slightly crinkled surface and a handle on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the word 'WELCOME' in a jagged font with a black bat motif above.
description_view_1: This side displays the word 'LUA' with the same bat motif above.
description_view_2: This side features the word 'ALOHA' in a similar style, with the bat motif above.
description_view_3: This side is blank except for the bat motif at the top, lacking any text.
